build.buildCommand: cd flutter-nest-househelp-master && npm install && npx tsc && npm run seed:railway

deploy.startCommand: cd flutter-nest-househelp-master && node dist/run-migration.js && node dist/database/seed.js && node dist/main

env.NIXPACKS_START_COMMAND: cd flutter-nest-househelp-master && node dist/run-migration.js && node dist/database/seed.js && node dist/main
